headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq Rise to Another Record. Software Strikes Back.
summary: The stock market rode a big rally in software stocks to fresh highs on Thursday despite another hot inflation report.  The Nasdaq gained 0.9%.  The Dow rose 25 points to post a slight gain and eke out a fresh record, too.

raw.headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq Rise to Another Record. Software Strikes Back.
raw.summary: The stock market rode a big rally in software stocks to fresh highs on Thursday despite another hot inflation report.  The Nasdaq gained 0.9%.  The Dow rose 25 points to post a slight gain and eke out a fresh record, too.

headline: Novel Spanish, Culturally Adapted Metastatic Breast Cancer Symptom Management Guide Debuts at ASCO 2026
summary: Viver Health is proud to announce a culturally adapted U.S. Spanish version of Your Guide to Managing Symptoms from Metastatic Breast Cancer Treatment (Spanish MBC Guide) available to U.S. healthcare professionals (HCPs) and debuting at the 2026 Annual Meeting of the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO).

raw.headline: Novel Spanish, Culturally Adapted Metastatic Breast Cancer Symptom Management Guide Debuts at ASCO 2026
raw.summary: Viver Health is proud to announce a culturally adapted U.S. Spanish version of Your Guide to Managing Symptoms from Metastatic Breast Cancer Treatment (Spanish MBC Guide) available to U.S. healthcare professionals (HCPs) and debuting at the 2026 Annual Meeting of the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO).

headline: FDA accelerated approval of Hepcludex significant milestone for US HDV market
summary: Hepcludex is now the first and only approved treatment for HDV patients in the US, marking a significant milestone for HDV patients and the HDV market.

raw.headline: FDA accelerated approval of Hepcludex significant milestone for US HDV market
raw.summary: Hepcludex is now the first and only approved treatment for HDV patients in the US, marking a significant milestone for HDV patients and the HDV market.

headline: Building A $100,000 All-Weather Dividend Portfolio For May 2026
summary: Screen large-cap dividend stocks using dividend yield + free cash flow yield for stronger income.
